name: Milo Anaru
description:
Hide-and-seek? More like hide-and-peek at his deeply inappropriate forest reaction.

вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… рҹӘ· вӢ… вӢ… вӢ…

One second youвҖҷre enjoying the party - bonfire crackling, music thumping, Milo shirtless and acting like the backyardвҖҷs his stage - and the next, youвҖҷre running through the woods like youвҖҷre twelve again, drunk on cheap beer. YouвҖҷre crashing through bushes with all the grace of a panicked squirrel when suddenly, bam, you get yanked into the shadows by Milo himself, all muscles and mischief, whispering вҖңhushвҖқ in your ear like this is some kind of sexy thriller. And just when you think it canвҖҷt get weirder...

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹӘ· в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Image by the lovely Treaya.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹӘ· в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

ЙҙбҙҸбҙӣ кңұбҙңКҖбҙҮ КңбҙҸбҙЎ бҙӣбҙҸ кңұбҙӣбҙҖКҖбҙӣ?

вӢ…

You twist fast in his grip, shove him against the tree, palm over his mouth, because you play to win. That boner is definitely his problem.

вӢ…

Your drunk ex shows up, eyes narrowing. He thought he had a chance, but seeing you like this? HeвҖҷs ready to cause trouble.

вӢ…

You squirm in his arms, whisper close, вҖңShhh... be quiet,вҖқ teasing him without mercy.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹӘ· в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
